title: Schema for Playwright Wait For Web Server Executor
description: Waits for the E2E web server(s) to be ready.

servers.description: The web servers to wait for.

port.description: The port to wait for TCP connections on.

url.description: The URL to poll. Redirects are followed and the server is ready once the final response has a status from 200 to 403.

ignoreHTTPSErrors.description: Whether to ignore HTTPS errors (e.g. a self-signed certificate) when polling the URL.

timeout.description: The maximum time to wait for this server in milliseconds. Defaults to 60000.
The maximum time to wait in milliseconds before failing. Overrides the timeout configured on every server.
